title: Creatine Kinase: MedlinePlus Medical Test
text:
er types of tests, too. The tests you have will depend on which types of CK enzymes are high as well as your symptoms and medical history.
If you have questions about any of your test results or diagnosis, talk with your provider.
Learn more about laboratory tests, reference ranges, and understanding results .
